name: dero-hive-cli
description: Terminal-native AI coding workspace with DERO tools, skills, and MCP support

scripts.test: tsx cli/src/tui/commands.test.ts && tsx cli/src/tui/mouse.test.ts && tsx cli/src/services/conversation.test.ts && tsx cli/src/services/permissions.test.ts && tsx src/main/db/client.test.ts && tsx src/main/providers/codex-acp.test.ts && tsx src/main/providers/adapters.test.ts && tsx src/main/providers/service.test.ts && tsx src/main/media/adapters.test.ts && tsx src/main/media/manager.test.ts && tsx src/main/simulator/manager.test.ts && tsx src/main/simulator/manager.detect.test.ts && tsx src/main/tools/builtin.test.ts && tsx src/main/utils/logger.test.ts && tsx src/main/utils/secrets.test.ts && tsx src/main/mcp/dero-packaged.test.ts && tsx cli/src/tui/render.test.ts && tsx src/shared/modelMetadata.test.ts && tsx src/shared/presets.test.ts && tsx src/main/xswd/client.test.ts && tsx src/main/xswd/manager.test.ts && tsx src/main/xswd/safety.test.ts
scripts.test:coverage: node --import tsx --test --test-concurrency=1 --experimental-test-coverage --test-coverage-lines=80 --test-coverage-branches=70 --test-coverage-functions=80 --test-coverage-include=cli/src/tui/commands.ts --test-coverage-include=cli/src/tui/mouse.ts --test-coverage-include=cli/src/tui/components.tsx --test-coverage-include=src/main/providers/models.ts --test-coverage-include=src/main/providers/registry.ts --test-coverage-include=src/main/providers/service.ts --test-coverage-include=src/main/tools/builtin.ts --test-coverage-include=src/main/utils/logger.ts --test-coverage-include=src/shared/modelMetadata.ts --test-coverage-include=src/shared/presets.ts cli/src/services/conversation.test.ts cli/src/services/permissions.test.ts cli/src/tui/commands.test.ts cli/src/tui/mouse.test.ts cli/src/tui/render.test.ts src/main/providers/codex-acp.test.ts src/main/providers/adapters.test.ts src/main/providers/service.test.ts src/main/media/adapters.test.ts src/main/simulator/manager.test.ts src/main/tools/builtin.test.ts src/main/utils/logger.test.ts src/shared/modelMetadata.test.ts src/shared/presets.test.ts
